scripts.install:all: npm install && cd dashboard && npm install && cd ../widget && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,dashboard,widget -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:dashboard" "npm run dev:widget"
scripts.build: cd widget && npm run build && cd ../dashboard && npm run build
scripts.lint: cd dashboard && npm run lint && cd ../widget && npm run lint
scripts.format: cd dashboard && npm run format && cd ../widget && npm run format
scripts.test: cd dashboard && npm run test && cd ../widget && npm run test
